header.name: Dr. Timothy J. Owen
header.subtitle: U.S. Army Veteran · IT Professional · South Puget Sound, WA

objective: U.S. Army veteran with 20 years of leadership and an active **DoD Secret clearance**, transitioning from distinguished military service to Information Technology. Holding **CompTIA Network+**, **AWS Cloud Practitioner**, and **Certified Entry-Level Python Programmer** certifications, and a completed Washington Vets-to-Tech program (Dec 2025), I'm eager to deliver secure, compliant IT support in dynamic, mission-critical environments — ensuring seamless operations and exceptional customer service.

transferableSkills.title: Analytical Thinking
transferableSkills.description: Designed SRS systems and AMPA rubrics — directly applicable to IT process optimization and troubleshooting workflows.

transferableSkills.title: Automation
transferableSkills.description: Built Python tools (Subnet Calculator, Tempo Finder) using algorithmic problem-solving relevant to IT scripting.

transferableSkills.title: Adaptability
transferableSkills.description: Mastered high-pressure military operations and rapid IT upskilling — translatable to dynamic, fast-moving environments.

transferableSkills.title: Organization
transferableSkills.description: Managed HR, security clearances, library, and $300K+ equipment inventory — akin to IT asset and data management.

bullets: Completed 16-week intensive program earning 18 college credits toward a B.S. in Computer Science
Mastered information security, ethical hacking, and threat intelligence through hands-on coursework
Implemented MFA and TLS encryption in labs; ensured compliance with HIPAA standards for clinical environments
Gained hands-on experience with network configuration (IPv4/v6, subnetting, VPN) — 100% lab completion rate
Acquired Python proficiency for automating end-user support tasks and data analysis labs
Configured Windows Server via PowerShell; deployed AWS EC2 applications, optimizing performance for clinical IT

experience.role: Saxophonist / Library Mgr / Security Mgr / Ops Mgr
bullets: Coordinated 50+ high-stakes missions across multiple sites for audiences totaling 2.5M+
Managed $300K in IT/musical equipment; maintained 100% readiness across 400+ missions
Oversaw DoD Secret clearances for 40+ personnel, ensuring ongoing security compliance
Facilitated Master Resilience Training (Level II) for 600+ students across 10 cohorts
Instructed 100+ trainees (beginner to DMA level) to a **100% pass rate**; maintained detailed weekly progress records analogous to IT trouble ticket documentation
Developed AMPA rubric (ASOM Form 1-9L), achieving qualification for all but one student
Contributed to 2010 curriculum transition — reduced training time by 58% for 5,000+ employees
Earned Distinguished Leader Award at Warrior Leader Course (2010)
Performed 120–150 missions including 60 overseas deployments; managed HR and library for 40+ members
Earned E5 promotion (2008) using SuperMemo spaced-repetition system for board preparation
Managed WordPress site and Google Forms for event publicity, streamlining workflows analogous to IT ticketing
Provided sound reinforcement for 100+ events, ensuring technical reliability

projects.title: Subnet Calculator
projects.description: Python tool automating IPv4 subnet calculations for network troubleshooting. Demonstrates scripting, documentation, and process optimization.

projects.title: Tempo Finder
projects.description: Binary-search algorithm identifying optimal practice tempos (30–240 BPM) at O(log n) efficiency. Showcases algorithmic problem-solving and user-focused design.

projects.title: Music Practice SRS
projects.description: Anki-based spaced repetition system for saxophone practice and military board preparation. Applied SuperMemo principles to automated scale/pattern generation.
